content.problemStatement:
It's not always easy to make up stories around problems ‚Äē like this one.

We know that there is a hidden sequence A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč which contains only integers between 111 and KKK inclusive. We have acquired MMM triplets (X1,Y1,Z1),(X2,Y2,Z2),‚Ä¶,(XM,YM,ZM)(X_1, Y_1, Z_1), (X_2, Y_2, Z_2), \ldots, (X_M, Y_M, Z_M)(X1‚Äč,Y1‚Äč,Z1‚Äč),(X2‚Äč,Y2‚Äč,Z2‚Äč),‚Ä¶,(XM‚Äč,YM‚Äč,ZM‚Äč). A very reliable source has given us intel that for each valid iii, the YiY_iYi‚Äč-th occurrence of the integer XiX_iXi‚Äč in the sequence AAA is AZiA_{Z_i}AZi‚Äč‚Äč, i.e. AZi=XiA_{Z_i} = X_iAZi‚Äč‚Äč=Xi‚Äč and there are Yi‚ąí1Y_i-1Yi‚Äč‚ąí1 indices j<Zij \lt Z_ij<Zi‚Äč such that Aj=XiA_j = X_iAj‚Äč=Xi‚Äč.

Find any sequence AAA consistent with this information or determine that no such sequence exists.
constraints: 1‚Č§Xi‚Č§K1 \le X_i \le K1‚Č§Xi‚Äč‚Č§K for each valid iii
1‚Č§Yi,Zi‚Č§N1 \le Y_i, Z_i \le N1‚Č§Yi‚Äč,Zi‚Äč‚Č§N for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
the sum of KKK over all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK and MMM.
MMM lines follow. For each iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§M1 \le i \le M1‚Č§i‚Č§M), the iii-th of these lines contains three space-separated integers Xi,YiX_i, Y_iXi‚Äč,Yi‚Äč and ZiZ_iZi‚Äč.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case:


If no valid sequence exists, print a single line containing the string `"No"`.
Otherwise, print two lines.
The first of these lines should contain the string `"Yes"`.
The second line should contain NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
